extensionDesc.message: Live Bank of China FX board: CNY rates against major currencies. Choose which currencies to show, pin the rate you care about on the toolbar badge, and get alerts when a rate crosses your threshold. Built on Manifest V3.

noData.message: No rate data yet — click refresh to retry

trendNote.message: Sparkline shows the market reference rate (data: frankfurter.dev / ECB). Its shape tracks the BOC board closely; absolute values differ slightly.
trendNote.description: Footer note clarifying the sparkline data source.

selectCurrencyHint.message: Tap to choose which currencies appear in the popup. Selection order is display order.

thresholdHint.message: Sends one notification the first time a rate crosses your high or low bound.

thresholdEmpty.message: Select a currency above to set an alert for it.
